codeReview.summary: Reviewed the original normalization/fingerprint feature plus the relevant hardening fixes. The original blocking issue is resolved: missing or blank provider anchor kinds are no longer canonicalized to real anchors, while canonical deleted anchors still drive deleted/fixed lifecycle behavior and reviewed-scope regressions are covered by the remediation follow-up.

summary: Reviewed the original feature handoff/transcript, the prior failed review, and the fix commits 485400692bec75af63f23f4614d6865da8622ae6 and 27097dc5f99963e0e820e674a4a10b563fdf013c against the current repo state. The empty-anchor normalization flaw called out in the prior review is fixed, deleted-anchor canonicalization still reaches the fixed lifecycle path, and the current internal/llm tests cover the relevant regressions, so this rerun passes.
